---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Indoor Navigation System
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 👣 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## 📉 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 📱 Environment Details
Please complete the following information:
 - **Device/Emulator:** [e.g. Pixel 6 / iOS Simulator]
 - **OS:** [e.g. Android 13 / iOS 16]
 - **Flutter Version:** [Run `flutter --version`]
 - **App Version:** [e.g. 1.0.0]

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (logs, stack traces, etc.).
